A 25 mL Schlenk flask equipped with a magnetic stir bar was charged with 4-bromoanisole (374 mg, 2.00 mmol, 1.0 equiv), morpholine (192 mg, 2.20 mmol, 1.1 equiv), Pd(OAc)2 (22 mg, 0.10 mmol, 5 mol%), XPhos (95 mg, 0.20 mmol, 10 mol%), and Cs2CO3 (978 mg, 3.00 mmol, 1.5 equiv). The flask was evacuated and backfilled with argon three times. Degassed 1,4-dioxane (10 mL) was added via syringe. The reaction mixture was heated to 100 °C with stirring for 18 h under argon, then cooled to room temperature. The mixture was diluted with EtOAc (30 mL) and washed with water (2 × 15 mL) and brine (15 mL). The organic layer was dried over Na2SO4, filtered, and concentrated. Flash chromatography on silica gel (hexanes/EtOAc, 60:40) gave 4-(4-methoxyphenyl)morpholine as a pale yellow solid (354 mg, 92%).
